userMessage: I'm a freelance nurse, 28 years old, just starting my practice
assistantMessage:
As a freelance nurse just starting your practice, you face protection challenges specific to your profession and career stage. At 28, you have the advantage of being able to set up income protection coverage at favorable rates. The primary risk for freelance nurses is work stoppage: the physical demands of your job (travel, patient handling, extended hours) significantly increase this risk.

At the start of your practice, your social contributions are calculated on a flat-rate basis, which means your daily allowances in case of absence will be very low in the first few years. Supplementary disability income coverage is therefore particularly important at this stage to avoid any interruption of income that could undermine your setup. Building solid protection from the start is an investment in the sustainability of your practice.

MetLife offers disability income contracts tailored to young healthcare professionals with scalable guarantees. Our Super Novaterm contract also provides death protection at accessible terms for young professionals. I recommend speaking with a MetLife advisor to refine these recommendations.

risks.label: Prolonged work stoppage
risks.description: The physical demands of freelance nursing (travel, patient handling) significantly increase the risk of work stoppage.

risks.label: Professional disability
risks.description: A disability could compromise your career just as you are establishing yourself as a freelance practitioner.

risks.label: Premature death
risks.description: At 28 the risk is statistically low, but minimum coverage is still recommended to protect your loved ones.

products.name: Disability Income Protection
products.relevance: Supplementary daily allowances essential at the start of your practice, when base allowances are calculated on a low flat-rate basis.

products.name: Super Novaterm
products.relevance: Accessible death protection for young professionals with adjustable capital as your situation evolves.

partners.relevance: Health prevention and workplace wellness for healthcare professionals subject to daily physical demands.
Setup assistance and administrative management for freelance nurses starting their practice.

resources.title: Starting a freelance practice: income protection guide
